query:
-- Normalize phones in clients table: prepend +1 to any phone that doesn't start with +
UPDATE clients
SET phone = CONCAT('+1', REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''))
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL 
  AND phone != '' 
  AND phone NOT LIKE '+%';

-- Normalize phones in client_accounts table
UPDATE client_accounts
SET phone = CONCAT('+1', REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''))
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL 
  AND phone != '' 
  AND phone NOT LIKE '+%';

-- Normalize phones in business_owners table
UPDATE business_owners
SET phone = CONCAT('+1', REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''))
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL 
  AND phone != '' 
  AND phone NOT LIKE '+%';
